title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
title_es: Databricks alcanza valuación de $188B con pivot hacia IA
bajada: Databricks se reposiciona como empresa de IA y publica investigación sobre ahorros de costo usando modelos open-weight para coding. La valuación refleja confianza del mercado en su estrategia de convertir datos en ventaja competitiva con IA.
bajada_en: Databricks repositions as an AI company and publishes research on cost savings from open-weight models for coding. The valuation reflects market confidence in its strategy to transform data into AI competitive advantage.

title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
summary: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI? On this episode of The […]
title_es: Apple demanda a OpenAI en disputa por entrenamient y uso de datos
bajada: Apple inicia demanda contra OpenAI con acusaciones sobre entrenamiento de modelos y prácticas de datos. Aunque expertos cuestionan la novedad legal de los alegatos, la acción marca escalada en tensiones entre compañías de hardware y IA sobre derechos de uso.
bajada_en: Apple sues OpenAI with allegations about model training and data practices. While experts question the legal novelty of the claims, the action marks escalation in hardware-AI company tensions over usage rights.

title: lyogavin /airllm
summary: Quickstart | Configurations | MacOS | Example notebooks | FAQ AirLLM dramatically reduces inference memory usage, letting 70B large language models run on a single 4GB GPU card — without quantization, distillation, or pruning. You can even run 405B Llama 3.1 on 8GB , and DeepSeek-V3 (671B) on ~12GB . AI Agents Recommendation: Best AI Game Sprite Generator Best AI Facial Expression Editor Bloome — build & run AI agent teams in the cloud, zero setup Updates [2026/06] v3.0 : FP8 model support + the latest models. Run DeepSeek-V3 (671B) on ~12GB and Qwen3-235B on ~3GB , plus Qwen3, Llama 3.x/4, DeepSeek V2/V3, Phi-4, Gemma and more — all through a single AutoModel . [2024/08/20] v2.11.0: Support Qwen2.5 [2024/08/18] v2.10.1 Support CPU inference. Support non sharded models. Thanks @NavodPeiris for the great work! [2024/07/30] Support Llama3.1 405B ( example notebook ). Support 8bit/4bit quantization . [2024/04/20] AirLLM supports Llama3 natively already. Run Llama3 70B on 4GB single GPU. [2023/12/25] v2.8.2: Support MacOS running 70B large language models. [2023/12/20] v2.7: Support AirLLMMixtral. [2023/12/20] v2.6: Added AutoModel, automatically detect model type, no need to provide model class to initialize model. [2023/12/18] v2.5: added prefetching to overlap the model loading and compute. 10% speed improvement. [2023/12/03] added support of ChatGLM , QWen , Baichuan , Mistral , InternLM ! [2023/12/02] added support for safetensors. Now support all top 10 models in open llm leaderboard. [2023/12/01] airllm 2.0. Support compressions: 3x run time speed up! [2023/11/20] airllm Initial version! Star History Table of Contents Quick start Model Compression Configurations Run on MacOS Example notebooks Supported Models Acknowledgement FAQ Quickstart 1. Install package First, install the airllm pip package. pip install airllm 2. Inference Then, initialize AirLLMLlama2, pass in the huggingface repo ID of the model being used, or the local path, and inference can be performed
title_es: AirLLM ejecuta modelos de 405B en GPU con solo 8GB de RAM
bajada: AirLLM logra breakthrough en eficiencia de memoria permitiendo ejecutar Llama 3.1 405B en 8GB sin cuantización ni destilación. La innovación democratiza acceso a modelos grandes para researchers sin clusters GPU, usando optimización de memoria intelligent.
bajada_en: AirLLM achieves memory efficiency breakthrough, running Llama 3.1 405B on 8GB without quantization or distillation. The innovation democratizes large model access for researchers without GPU clusters through intelligent memory optimization.

title: A scorecard for the AI age
summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
title_es: OpenAI presenta scorecard para medir ROI de IA en empresas
bajada: Sarah Friar, CFO de OpenAI, lanza un framework práctico para evaluar el retorno de inversión en IA midiendo trabajo útil, costo por tarea exitosa, confiabilidad y retorno por compute. La herramienta ayuda a empresas a cuantificar el valor real de sus implementaciones de IA más allá de métricas técnicas.
bajada_en: OpenAI's CFO Sarah Friar introduces a practical framework to measure AI ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and compute return. The tool helps enterprises quantify the real value of their AI implementations beyond technical metrics.

title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
summary: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.
title_es: NVIDIA Vera Rubin optimiza coste de post-training para IA agentic
bajada: NVIDIA presenta la arquitectura Vera Rubin que maximiza inteligencia por dólar en cargas de post-training, reduciendo dramáticamente el costo por token. Esto es crítico para la era de agentes IA, donde la eficiencia computacional determina la viabilidad económica de los modelos.
bajada_en: NVIDIA's Vera Rubin architecture maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training workloads by drastically reducing cost per token. This is critical for the agentic AI era, where computational efficiency directly impacts model viability.

title: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
title_es: Hugging Face y NVIDIA simplifican fine-tuning de modelos de video e imagen
bajada: Hugging Face 🤗 Diffusers se integra con NVIDIA NeMo Automodel para permitir fine-tuning a escala de modelos de video e imagen. Esta colaboración reduce barreras técnicas para que developers entrenen modelos visuales complejos sin infraestructura especializada.
bajada_en: Hugging Face 🤗 Diffusers integrates with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel to enable large-scale fine-tuning of video and image models. This collaboration lowers technical barriers for developers to train complex visual models without specialized infrastructure.

title: Prompt Injection Attacks Are Thwarting AI Hacking Agents
summary: “Context bombing” tricks malicious AI agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
title_es: Ataques de prompt injection frenan a agentes IA maliciosos
bajada: Investigadores demuestran que "context bombing" puede engañar a agentes IA maliciosos para que se detengan antes de causar daño. La técnica abre nuevas defensas contra ataques automatizados pero también plantea preocupaciones sobre confiabilidad de sistemas autónomos.
bajada_en: Researchers show that "context bombing" can trick malicious AI agents into shutting down before causing harm. The technique opens new defenses against automated attacks but also raises concerns about autonomous system reliability.

title: San Francisco Demands Apple and Google Delete AI ‘Nudify’ Apps From App Stores
summary: The City Attorney’s Office sent the tech giants cease-and-desist letters this week telling them to stop profiting from 13 “face-swap” apps that are overwhelmingly used to target women and girls.
title_es: San Francisco ordena eliminar apps de "deepfake pornográfico" de stores
bajada: La ciudad envía cartas de cese a Apple y Google exigiendo remover 13 apps de face-swap usadas para crear contenido sexual sintético. La acción legal busca detener explotación principalmente dirigida a mujeres y menores de edad.
bajada_en: San Francisco sends cease-and-desist letters to Apple and Google demanding removal of 13 face-swap apps used to create synthetic sexual content. Legal action targets exploitation primarily directed at women and minors.

title: VulnHunter: Capital One's agentic AI code security tool
title_es: Capital One abre VulnHunter: herramienta agentic para seguridad de código
bajada: Capital One lanza VulnHunter como open-source, una herramienta agentic para detectar vulnerabilidades en código automáticamente. La solución democratiza análisis de seguridad avanzado, permitiendo que devs integren búsqueda de vulnerabilidades impulsada por IA en sus pipelines.
bajada_en: Capital One releases VulnHunter as open-source, an agentic tool for automatic code vulnerability detection. The solution democratizes advanced security analysis, enabling developers to integrate AI-powered vulnerability hunting in their pipelines.

title: How Google’s New Gemini Rates Work and How to Track Your Usage
summary: Now that Google has changed how its usage quotas are tallied, you might not get as many AI responses as you did before.
title_es: Google cambia sistema de cuotas en Gemini: menos respuestas por usuario
bajada: Google modifica cómo cuenta el uso de Gemini en sus cuotas, resultando en menos respuestas de IA para los usuarios. El cambio afecta a developers integrando Google's APIs y devs que dependen de créditos gratuitos en sus aplicaciones.
bajada_en: Google changes how Gemini usage quotas are calculated, resulting in fewer AI responses per user. The change impacts developers integrating Google's APIs and those relying on free credits in their applications.

title: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
summary: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra. The tool is initially being tested with "some" US creators, TikTok US spokesperson Zachary Kizer tells The Verge. YouTube has been working on a similar tool […]
title_es: TikTok prueba herramienta para detectar deepfakes de usuarios
bajada: TikTok comienza pruebas piloto de una herramienta que detecta clones de IA de creadores y permite reportarlos. El feature se lanza primero en Estados Unidos y sigue la estela de YouTube en la detección de sintéticos, respondiendo a crecientes preocupaciones sobre fraude.
bajada_en: TikTok pilots a tool that detects AI clones of creators and lets them report them. The feature rolls out first in the US, following YouTube's lead in synthetic detection and addressing mounting concerns about fraud.

title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.
title_es: VC predice redistribución de riqueza generada por IA en Silicon Valley
bajada: Neil Rimer, cofundador de Index Ventures, anticipa que la riqueza histórica creada por IA deberá redistribuirse voluntariamente o por fuerza regulatoria. La declaración refleja inquietudes crecientes sobre concentración económica en el sector.
bajada_en: Index Ventures co-founder Neil Rimer predicts historic AI-generated wealth in Silicon Valley must be redistributed—voluntarily or through regulation. The statement reflects growing concerns about economic concentration in the sector.

title: Kaiser nurses say AI, surveillance are making their jobs and patient care worse
title_es: Enfermeras de Kaiser reportan que IA y vigilancia empeoran atención
bajada: Personal de enfermería en Kaiser Permanente denuncia que sistemas de IA y vigilancia laboral degradan cuidado de pacientes y condiciones de trabajo. El reportaje refleja tensiones crecientes entre automatización corporativa y calidad de servicios críticos.
bajada_en: Kaiser Permanente nurses report AI and workplace surveillance systems degrade patient care and working conditions. The reporting reflects growing tensions between corporate automation and critical service quality.

title: Claude Code: Anatomy of a Misfeature
title_es: Análisis crítico: problemas de diseño en Claude Code de Anthropic
bajada: Desarrollador publica análisis detallado de deficiencias en la característica Claude Code de Anthropic. La crítica expone trade-offs de design en ejecución de código autónomo y genera debate sobre seguridad y utilidad en agentes IA.
bajada_en: Developer publishes detailed analysis of design flaws in Anthropic's Claude Code feature. The critique exposes trade-offs in autonomous code execution design and sparks debate on safety and utility in AI agents.

title: Your Period Tracker Is (Probably) Spying on You
summary: Plus: Russian cyberspies turn to infrastructure hacking, DHS repeatedly fails to realize it’d been hacked, a breach exposes an AI music generator’s scraping ways, and more.
title_es: Rastreadores de ciclo menstrual exponen datos privados de usuarios
bajada: Investigación revela que aplicaciones de seguimiento menstrual comparten datos sensibles con terceros, incluyendo datos de generadores IA de música sobre scraping. El hallazgo suma presión regulatoria sobre privacy en apps de salud reproductiva.
bajada_en: Investigation reveals period tracker apps share sensitive user data with third parties, including AI music generators' scraping practices. Finding adds regulatory pressure on reproductive health app privacy.
